    EvaluateTriangles(Scene, RuntimeOptions, Animation, float)

    Yields a collection of triangles representing the geometry in world space.

    Declaration
    public static IEnumerable<(IVertexBuilder A, IVertexBuilder B, IVertexBuilder C, Material Material)> EvaluateTriangles(this Scene scene, RuntimeOptions options = null, Animation animation = null, float time = 0)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Scene scene

    A Scene instance.
    RuntimeOptions options

    Evaluation options.
    Animation animation

    An Animation instance, or null.
    float time

    The animation time.
    Returns
    Type Description
    IEnumerable<(IVertexBuilder A, IVertexBuilder B, IVertexBuilder C, Material Material)>

    A collection of triangles in world space.

    EvaluateTriangles<TvG, TvM>(Scene, RuntimeOptions, Animation, float)

    Yields a collection of triangles representing the geometry in world space.

    Declaration
    public static IEnumerable<EvaluatedTriangle<TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty>> EvaluateTriangles<TvG, TvM>(this Scene scene, RuntimeOptions options = null, Animation animation = null, float time = 0) where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    Scene scene

    A Scene instance.
    RuntimeOptions options

    Evaluation options.
    Animation animation

    An Animation instance, or null.
    float time

    The animation time.
    Returns
    Type Description
    IEnumerable<EvaluatedTriangle<TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty>>

    A collection of triangles in world space.
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TvG

    The vertex fragment type with Position, Normal and Tangent.
    TvM

    The vertex fragment type with Colors and Texture Coordinates.
